hotel_name: Courtyard by Marriott Isla Verde Beach Resort

reviews.title: Bed Bugs!!
reviews.text: I am bitten all over!!! I am contacting lawyers because this is absolutely ridiculous. I am literally in pain from the bites and so are my other friends. We went for a Mommy Vacation, just a weekend and are bitten all over

reviews.title: They have a bed  bug chinches en la cama
reviews.positives: The location of the property is good. The lovey and the Swiming Pool area is really nice with the yard.
reviews.negatives: The view the property is not nice. It looks clean everything but I have some box on the bed.

reviews.title: Hidden fees
reviews.text: The price on the site is not what you pay. There’s 18% resort fees added. It’s not really discounted at all. Read the fine print.

reviews.title: Terrible waste of money.
reviews.negatives: The hotel is directly under a major airline flight path. The sound of the flights kept us up all night. We paid for an oceanfront room and it was a partial oceanfront with a concrete wall. The hotel refused to change our room. The hotel is out of date and under construction.

reviews.title: Quick get away
reviews.text: We decided to take a trip last minute and found a great deal for this hotel. Overall our experience was good. I only wish it was closer to more restaurants and nightlife. The hotel food is good we just like to explore food choices outside of the hotel.
reviews.room_type: Ocean front, Guest room, 1 King, Oceanfront, Away from elevator, Balcony

reviews.title: So I came back to this hotel, because the first time I enjoyed it second time I come back it’s under renovation and ever
reviews.positives: I like that the property was close to the beach but the property smelled like a retirement home. They are doing renovations they should’ve definitely told the guest that I would’ve picked another five star hotel for my birthday stay instead I had to stay at a hotel that smell like a fucking retirement home. Worst experience ever.
reviews.negatives: It was under renovation and nobody told me the smell in the hallways just stunk

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Price were a little to high for one night. Update Tv to have neftlix and internet on it. Very Friendly staff always willing to help
reviews.room_type: Standard, Guest room, 1 King, Non-Private Sofa bed

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: I had a roach on the room which was gross . And the bathrooms are dated and rug smelled .

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The beach is fabulous for adults and young children. Would love to stay again

reviews.title: Just name, It is not a resort, it is an expensive hotel for what it offers
reviews.negatives: many things. It is not a resort, it is a hotel not a resort and very expensive for what it offers. The staff for the most part is not friendly and helpful, its breakfast buffet is very short of options because they never change it, as well as the lunch and dinner menus. we prefer to order doordash. They do not do activities for the guests and their parking lot has to pay 25us per day. I paid for 2 rooms each for 5 nights more than 4300us and for that value I would have expected better service. I was carried away by the name of the hotel. I would think 5 times about going back.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.room_type: Ocean front, Guest Room, 2 Queen, Oceanfront, Balcony

reviews.title: terrible value, trying to get my money back
reviews.negatives: outdated, mildew, by the airport. birds flying on the food at breakfast buffet in the lobby

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text: Great time highly recommend for quick vcay from the city

reviews.title: I can't recommend this hotel
reviews.negatives:
1) the noise in the room (700) due Airport traffic avoids to rest, air traffic don't stop during the night
2) we had a problem with bedbugs, we try to explain in reception and the room service changed the bed sheets, but the issue continues, hotel people told us that it was due mosquitoes, I explained that was impossible due allocations of some stings and only affect to my wife and me, my kid slept in the crib and no stings
3) After 7pm (approx.) it wasn't impossible to stay in the outside bar, insect plage cover all
4) we seated in outside bar at 5:40 the waitress brought us the menu, after 20-25 minutes waiting when the waitress return for order it wasn't possible due the menu change at 6:00 pm, we ordered in the room through room service

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very good hotel, but personel should be a little more friendly..

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Location and the Comfort bed only
reviews.negatives: Stuff is not helpful cleaning not that much great very expensive

reviews.title: Great area
reviews.text: I will definitely be staying here again.

reviews.title: I will never stay there again
reviews.positives: Staff at the pool were goods
reviews.negatives: Hotel room was old. Part of the shower was broken. Over priced. Could hear airplanes all day and night

reviews.title: Honeymoon Getaway
reviews.text: We stayed here for our first time in Puerto Rico, on our honeymoon! The room, the amenities, the service, the views, and our stay were so perfect! We will definitely be staying again!
reviews.room_type: Standard, Guest room, 1 King, Non-Private Sofa bed

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: The staff at the pool was harassing. We were their for a wedding, and they harassed us terribly. The food was average and overpriced. The room was old and stank.

reviews.title: Loved it!
reviews.text: This resort was perfect for a quick getaway! No complaints at all.

reviews.title: Not a resort
reviews.negatives: Did not feel like a resort. More like a mid level hotel. Limited food options, beach was okay, location not great.

reviews.title: Beautiful property
reviews.text: This was very accommodating!!! We got everything that we needed for our stay. The service was excellent and the property was sensational.
reviews.room_type: Standard, Guest room, 1 King, Non-Private Sofa bed

reviews.positives: The staff was excellent. The location was great!
reviews.negatives: The hotel had a bad odor, the carpet was lifting and very old and there were roaches in my room.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: It was a great place. I will stay here again. The rooms are very comfortable. Loved the casino. Loved sitting outside. And using the pool.  I was very happy with it. The service was good the staff was awesome.
reviews.room_type: Standard, Guest room, 1 King, Non-Private Sofa bed

reviews.title: Seven beach, horrible food service, bad location as right at the airport and too loud.
reviews.positives: The resort is on a great private beach, not too crowded with good pool and chair service, nice lobby decour.
reviews.negatives: The food service is horrendous. Not only is it very basic in taste, the service is NONEXISTENT. They are either severely understaffed or disorganized but we had to wait close to an hour each morning for a cup of coffee and eggs. Every day. At $500 a night, this is not acceptable! Also nothing else within walking distance. And oh yeah, you are sleeping at the airport and the planes fly over your head, jarring you awake. Bad. Would not recommend.

reviews.title: Decent wouldn’t stay again
reviews.negatives: Sand fleas in our room, wet moldy carpet, noise from the airport, room was filthy

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The staff was excellent. Food was great.
reviews.negatives: Prior to booking this trip we had no clue about the construction and renovations. We were woken up everyday to jack hammering and noise.  Not very vacation like. If we knew about the construction we would have never booked. Also. We stayed in room 517. The bed was awfully hard and the a.c. barely worked.

reviews.title: Not comfortable or accommodating for the amount of money being spent
reviews.negatives: Room

reviews.title: Overpriced with no redeeeming value
reviews.negatives: Everything else

reviews.title: Extremely average other than the bartending staff who was excellent
reviews.negatives: My room was not ready on time. Hotel rooms are dated and they never brought enough towels.

reviews.title: Run down Motel 6 type of experience
reviews.negatives: 1. Location is a hundred yards away from the airplane takeoff spot. It’s extremely loud both at the beach and in the rooms from the airplane’s engines accelerating. Hotels should not be allowed to be built at that spot. 2. The property can be described as a motel 6 in bad shape. It desperately needs renovation. All the furniture is extremely used and dirty. 3. The air conditioning unit is old and loud. 4. The walls are paper thin. If your neighbors are talking you will not be able to fall asleep. 5. The restaurants are poorly rated and not well kept. We got an Uber and went downtown Old San Juan for dinner and then breakfast. 6. I would not stay in this hotel even if it was free. 7. There are signs at the entrance of the beach warning about catching a mosquito related disease. The hotel offers insect repellent free of charge.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
No microwave 
Limited bilingual speaking staff

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
No microwave 
Was not worth what we paid

reviews.title: The management promised to reimburse me but never did for the spoiled food!!!
reviews.positives: It was located on the beach
reviews.negatives: The cleaning service took things like sodas from our room. Used our towels  found black hairs everywhere in our bathroom. Fridge didn’t work and spoiled our food .

reviews.title: Overall, woud not stay here again
reviews.positives: Being right by the beach, having access to free beach chairs and umbrellas if needed set up by hotel staff. Proximity to San Juan airpots and hassle free travel to/from airport.
reviews.negatives: We were very disappointed due to bedbug issue in our room with new rash - although we could not actually identify bedbug we are pretty certain as rash fitted breakfast-lunch-dinner pattern. Cleaning staff was very nice and they cleaned our room thoroughly after we reported but they also could not find bedbugs and issue persisted for one more day. It made our stay stressful and unpleasant.

reviews.title: It was ok.
reviews.negatives: It was under construction, the air gave out in my room, the tv didn’t work for a few days. The sand mites got a hold of me and I have bumps all over. Went to the front desk to see if they sold alcohol, they only had a few small pads to give which didn’t cover my arm much less my whole body.

reviews.title: Horrible
reviews.negatives: The property was under construction! The bar was closed, constitution everywhere. Main entrance was closed, the entire lobby was a mess.

reviews.title: Very disappointing
reviews.positives: The beach and pool area are beautiful
reviews.negatives: The cleanliness of the hotel was highly disappointing. Upon arrival, we noticed a strong, unpleasant odor in the room and hallway, reminiscent of an old vacuum mixed with soured milk. While the beds appeared to have been changed, the floors were littered with debris, including beads from a broken necklace, hair, and crumbs. The bathroom was equally unclean, particularly in the corners and behind the toilet. When I inquired about the state of the hotel, I was informed that renovations are planned for next year. Unfortunately, it seems that in the meantime, little effort is being made to maintain basic cleanliness, despite the high room rates.

reviews.title: I would not return to this resort again
reviews.negatives: Customer service and we had a bad experience with the bartender being a racist.

reviews.title: It was decent but all the extra cost for what if everything was supposed to be included !!!!!!
reviews.negatives: All the extra fees after check out for no reason after paying $$720 at check in plus $100 deposit: parking daily $25 paying for breakfast each day $28
